  Summary: Created Java project structure with pom.xml, Main.java, and static web resources under src/main/resources/static.

  Summary: Implemented home page plus Activities, Assignments, and Projects pages with image/date/title/description form and category navigation.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions needed for this Java + static HTML/CSS/JS setup.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Compiled successfully using local JDK 21 with javac; Maven was not installed in PATH.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Added and ran VS Code build task "Build Algorithm Portfolio" to compile Main.java into target/classes.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Summary: Prompted for debug mode and received confirmation; debug attachment failed without Maven, so the app was launched directly and is running at http://localhost:8080.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	Summary: Added README.md with project usage details and removed HTML comments from this checklist file.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
